FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in odd-numbered years. Sample redrawn in 1985, 2015, and 2025; cross-year comparisons should account for redesign breaks.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Longitudinal survey of U.S. housing units tracking housing quality, costs, neighborhood conditions, and household mobility. Fielded biennially at national and select metro levels.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: AHS Housing Costs Statistics tabulation provides summary statistics on housing cost burden-the share of income devoted to housing-and related cost variables from the American Housing Survey.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in odd-numbered years.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Longitudinal survey of U.S. housing units tracking housing quality, costs, neighborhood conditions, and household mobility. Fielded biennially at national and select metro levels.

COMPONENT_LABEL: American Housing Survey Plumbing, Water, and Sewage Disposal
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: AHS Plumbing, Water, and Sewage Disposal tabulation reports on access to complete plumbing facilities, the primary source of water supply, and sewage disposal method from the American Housing Survey. Used to monitor substandard housing conditions.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in odd-numbered years.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Longitudinal survey of U.S. housing units tracking housing quality, costs, neighborhood conditions, and household mobility. Fielded biennially at national and select metro levels.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: County Business Patterns (CBP) provides annual establishment counts, employment, and payroll by NAICS industry for every U.S. county, metro area, state, and the nation. Released annually, CBP is widely used for local economic analysis, market research, and policy planning.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Nonemployer Statistics (NES) are annual data on non-farm businesses without paid employees-primarily sole proprietors and partnerships with no payroll. Covers establishment counts and receipts by NAICS industry at the national, state, and county levels.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Business Dynamics Statistics (BDS) measure annual changes in employment and establishment counts, capturing births, deaths, expansions, and contractions of firms and establishments. Provides a unique longitudinal view of U.S. business dynamics by industry, geography, firm age, and firm size.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Commodity Flow Survey (CFS) Hazardous Materials Data focus specifically on shipments of DOT-regulated hazardous materials, reporting value, weight, mode, and commodity type to support transportation safety planning and emergency preparedness.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7, aligned with the Economic Census cycle.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Commodity Flow Survey - Geographic Area Data
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Commodity Flow Survey (CFS) Geographic Area Data report shipment value, weight, and mode of transport by origin state and NAICS industry sector, providing a national picture of freight flows from every U.S. region.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7, aligned with the Economic Census cycle.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Commodity Flow Survey (CFS) Temperature-Controlled Shipments Data report freight shipped under refrigerated or heated conditions, covering food, pharmaceuticals, and other temperature-sensitive commodities by mode and region.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7, aligned with the Economic Census cycle.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Commodity Flow Survey (CFS) Export Data report the characteristics of shipments destined for export (value, weight, commodity, mode, origin) from U.S. locations, linking domestic freight flows to international trade.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7, aligned with the Economic Census cycle.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Commodity Flow Survey (CFS) Preliminary Data provide early-release national totals for shipment value, weight, and ton-miles before the full geographic and commodity detail is available, offering a first look at current freight activity.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7, aligned with the Economic Census cycle.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Vehicle Inventory and Use Survey (VIUS) - All Vehicles provides detailed data on the characteristics and use of trucks operated by U.S. businesses, including fleet size, vehicle type, fuel, mileage, and cargo. Conducted periodically by the Census Bureau for DOT.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted periodically; collected as part of Economic Census cycles 1963–2002, discontinued, then resumed in 2021.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Vehicle Inventory and Use Survey Public Use File
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Vehicle Inventory and Use Survey (VIUS) Public Use File contains record-level microdata (with identifying information removed) for individual trucks in the VIUS sample, enabling custom analyses of commercial vehicle characteristics and use patterns.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted every 5 years as part of Economic Census cycles 1963–2002, then discontinued; resumed in 2021.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Quarterly Summary of State and Local Tax Revenue Timeseries
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Quarterly Summary of State and Local Government Tax Revenue (QTAX) provides quarterly tax collections for all 50 states and the District of Columbia, broken down by type of tax (property, sales, income, etc.). Key indicator of state fiscal capacity.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Time Series Economic Indicators Time Series: Quarterly Survey of Public Pensions
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Quarterly Survey of Public Pensions (QSPP) measures quarterly assets, liabilities, revenue, and expenditures of state and local government retirement systems. Provides timely data on the fiscal health of public pension funds.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Value Series (2012 benchmark) provides value-of-shipments, inventories, and value-added estimates for manufacturing industries at national and state levels, anchored to the 2012 Economic Census benchmark.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Value Series (2017 benchmark) provides updated manufacturing value-of-shipments, inventories, and value-added statistics anchored to the 2017 Economic Census benchmark.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Benchmark 2017 provides the final benchmarked national manufacturing statistics for the 2017 ASM cycle, aligned to the 2017 Economic Census for the most accurate ASM time series.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Benchmark provides the most recent benchmarked national manufacturing statistics aligned to the latest Economic Census, serving as the authoritative ASM reference point.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Geographic Area Series (2012 benchmark) provides establishment counts, employment, payroll, and production statistics for manufacturing industries at state and sub-state levels, using the 2012 Economic Census as anchor.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Manufactures (ASM) Geographic Area Series (2017 benchmark) provides state and sub-state manufacturing statistics (employment, payroll, shipments) using the 2017 Economic Census as anchor.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Business Survey (ABS) provides data on business ownership by race, ethnicity, gender, and veteran status, along with R&D activity, innovation, and technology use for non-farm employer businesses. Combines and replaces the Survey of Business Owners and Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection beginning with survey year 2017; replaced the quinquennial Survey of Business Owners (SBO) for employer businesses.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Business Survey (ABS) Characteristics of Businesses module provides detailed data on business ownership demographics, financing, and operational characteristics for employer businesses.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection beginning with survey year 2017; replaced the quinquennial Survey of Business Owners (SBO) for employer businesses.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Business Survey (ABS) Characteristics of Business Owners module provides demographic and socioeconomic profiles of business owners (race, gender, veteran status, education, citizenship) for employer businesses.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection beginning with survey year 2017; replaced the quinquennial Survey of Business Owners (SBO) for employer businesses.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Business Survey (ABS) Company Summary module provides aggregate employment, payroll, and receipts by race/ethnicity, gender, veteran status, and firm size at national and state levels.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection beginning with survey year 2017; replaced the quinquennial Survey of Business Owners (SBO) for employer businesses.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs Characteristics of Businesses
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs (ASE) Characteristics of Businesses provides data on business financing, technology use, government contracting, and other operational characteristics for employer businesses, by owner demographics. Predecessor to the ABS.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection for survey years 2014–2016; superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs Characteristics of Business Owners
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs (ASE) Characteristics of Business Owners provides owner demographic and socioeconomic profiles including race, gender, education, and immigration status. Predecessor to the ABS owner module.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection for survey years 2014–2016; superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs Company Summary
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs (ASE) Company Summary provides aggregate employment, payroll, and receipts by owner race/ethnicity, gender, veteran status, and firm size. Predecessor to the ABS company summary.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Annual collection for survey years 2014–2016; superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Survey of Business Owners Company Summary
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Survey of Business Owners (SBO) Company Summary provides aggregate counts, receipts, payroll, and employment by owner race/ethnicity, sex, and veteran status for non-farm employer and nonemployer businesses.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7; discontinued after 2012 and superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Survey of Business Owners Characteristics of Business
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Survey of Business Owners (SBO) Characteristics of Business provides detailed data on business financing, contracting, and operations by owner race, ethnicity, and gender for non-farm employer businesses. The primary predecessor to the ABS.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7; discontinued after 2012 and superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Survey of Business Owners Characteristics of Business Owners
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Survey of Business Owners (SBO) Characteristics of Business Owners provides demographic profiles of business owners including race, sex, veteran status, and education for non-farm employer businesses.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7; discontinued after 2012 and superseded by the Annual Business Survey (ABS) starting 2017.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Time Series International Trade: Monthly U.S. Exports by End-use Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by End-Use Code classify goods exports by the Bureau of Economic Analysis end-use category (capital goods, consumer goods, industrial supplies, etc.), providing an economic-purpose view of export composition.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by Advanced Technology Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by Advanced Technology Code report exports of products classified as high-tech under the BEA technology classification, enabling tracking of U.S. technology export trends.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Time Series International Trade: Monthly U.S. Exports by Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by Harmonized System (HS) Code provide the most detailed commodity-level view of U.S. merchandise exports using the international HS classification system.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by NAICS Industry Code cross-reference merchandise exports to the producing industry using NAICS codes, bridging trade and production statistics.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by Port and Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by Port and HS Code provide export statistics at the district/port of export level combined with HS commodity codes, supporting port-level trade analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by Standard International Trade Classification (SITC) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by Standard International Trade Classification (SITC) Code provide exports in the UN-standard SITC classification, enabling international comparisons of U.S. trade patterns.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by State and Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by State and HS Code report the origin state of export goods combined with HS commodity codes, linking sub-national production geography to international trade flows.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by State and North American Industry Classification System (NAICS)
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by State and NAICS Code report export values by the origin state of the exporting industry using NAICS codes, enabling state-level export performance analysis by industry.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Exports by Department of Agriculture Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Exports by USDA Agricultural Code report agricultural commodity exports using the USDA's own classification system, supporting agricultural trade policy and market analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by End-use Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by End-Use Code classify goods imports by economic purpose (capital goods, consumer goods, industrial supplies, etc.), providing a BEA-category view of import composition.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by Advanced Technology Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by Advanced Technology Code report imports of high-tech products under the BEA technology classification, enabling tracking of technology trade balances.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by Harmonized System (HS) Code provide the most detailed commodity-level view of U.S. merchandise imports using the international HS classification.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by NAICS Industry Code cross-reference merchandise imports to the consuming industry, bridging trade and production statistics for import-demand analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by Port and Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by Port and HS Code provide import statistics at the district/port-of-entry level combined with HS commodity codes, supporting port-level trade analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by Standard International Trade Classification (SITC) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by SITC Code provide imports in the UN-standard SITC classification, enabling international comparisons of U.S. import patterns.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by State and Harmonized System (HS) Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by State of Destination and HS Code link import flows to the U.S. state where goods are ultimately consumed or processed, combined with HS commodity detail.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by State and North American Industry Classification System (NAICS)
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by State of Destination and NAICS Code link import flows to the destination state using industry codes, supporting sub-national import demand analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Monthly U.S. Imports by Department of Agriculture Code
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Monthly U.S. Imports by USDA Agricultural Code report agricultural commodity imports under the USDA classification, supporting agricultural trade policy and food security analysis.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Time-series economic surveys including Annual Survey of Manufactures and international trade data products. Provides annual estimates between economic census benchmarks.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Mining: Detailed Statistics by Type of Operation for the U.S., States, and Offshore Areas
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Economic Census Mining Detailed Statistics by Type of Operation break down mining sector employment, payroll, and receipts by operational type (e.g., surface vs. underground mining) for the U.S., states, and offshore areas.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive economic census conducted every 5 years covering employment, payroll, revenue, and operations for all U.S. industries and geographies. The benchmark for U.S. economic statistics.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Mining: Location of Mines by Employment Size for Subsectors and Industries for the U.S., States, and Offshore Area
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Economic Census Mining Location of Mines by Employment Size reports the number and distribution of mining establishments across employment size classes by NAICS subsector and industry, for the U.S., states, and offshore areas.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive economic census conducted every 5 years covering employment, payroll, revenue, and operations for all U.S. industries and geographies. The benchmark for U.S. economic statistics.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Manufacturing: Location of Manufacturing Establishments by Employment Size for the U.S., States, and Counties
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Economic Census Manufacturing Location of Establishments by Employment Size reports the number of manufacturing establishments distributed across employment size classes by NAICS industry, for the U.S., states, and counties.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive economic census conducted every 5 years covering employment, payroll, revenue, and operations for all U.S. industries and geographies. The benchmark for U.S. economic statistics.

COMPONENT_LABEL: Summary Statistics for the U.S., States, and Selected Geographies: 2022
COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: Economic Census Summary Statistics for the U.S., States, and Selected Geographies provide the core business activity measures-number of establishments, sales/revenue, payroll, and employment-by NAICS industry sector at national, state, metro, county, and place levels. The primary entry point for Economic Census data.
FREQUENCY_NOTES: Conducted in years ending in 2 or 7.
PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive economic census conducted every 5 years covering employment, payroll, revenue, and operations for all U.S. industries and geographies. The benchmark for U.S. economic statistics.
